question: What is the main difficulty in interpreting this revenue chart from 1924 to 2024?

options.A: The chart is so small that it is hard to read exact values and see modest changes over time.
options.B: Revenue clearly decreased in every decade after 1980.
options.C: Revenue stayed exactly the same throughout the entire period.
options.D: The chart shows clear seasonal cycles within each decade.

explanation: Revenue declined from 1980 to 1990. The extremely small axis labels can make it hard to read which period had the decline.
